about.metaTitle: About Big Dragons Gym | Blaenau Ffestiniog
about.metaDescription: Learn about Big Dragons Gym — a premium 24/7 fitness facility in Blaenau Ffestiniog, North Wales, serving the local community with expert training.
about.intro: Big Dragons Gym is a 24/7 fitness facility in the heart of Blaenau Ffestiniog, North Wales. We're a locally owned gym with a premium training environment — built for people who take their training seriously.
about.mission: To provide unrestricted access to quality training facilities and expert coaching in a supportive, community-driven environment. Whether you're picking up your first barbell or chasing a new personal best, Big Dragons Gym is your home.
about.distinct: We're located inside Jerusalem Chapel at 32 High Street — the same building as Little Dragons Softplay, but a completely separate business. Big Dragons Gym is a dedicated 24/7 fitness facility with its own entrance and identity.

values.community: A welcoming North Wales training community
values.quality: Premium equipment in a clean, professional environment

personalTraining.metaTitle: Personal Trainer Blaenau Ffestiniog | Big Dragons Gym
personalTraining.metaDescription: Personal training in Blaenau Ffestiniog. Goal setting, programme design, and form coaching for all levels.
personalTraining.intro: Work one-to-one with an experienced coach at Big Dragons Gym — personalised training designed around your goals, experience, and schedule.
personalTraining.aboutCoaching: Our personal training is built around you — approachable, experienced coaching with the guidance and accountability you need. Whether you're new to the gym or breaking through a plateau, sessions are tailored to your level.

includes.environment: Access to a premium training facility

personalTraining.forWho: Complete beginners building confidence. Experienced lifters chasing new PRs. Anyone who wants expert guidance in a premium, no-nonsense environment.
personalTraining.pricingNote: Rates vary depending on session frequency and goals. Contact us for a personalised quote — no pressure, just honest advice.

faqs.q1: Do I need experience to start personal training?
faqs.a1: Not at all. Our coaches work with complete beginners through to experienced lifters. Sessions are tailored to your level.
faqs.a2: Session length depends on your programme. Contact us to discuss what works best for your goals and schedule.
faqs.q3: Can I combine PT with 24/7 membership?
faqs.a3: Yes. Many members combine personal training sessions with independent 24/7 gym access for the best of both worlds.
faqs.a4: All sessions take place at Big Dragons Gym, Jerusalem Chapel, 32 High Street, Blaenau Ffestiniog.

nutrition.metaTitle: Nutrition Advice | Big Dragons Gym North Wales
nutrition.metaDescription: Practical nutrition advice and meal planning support at Big Dragons Gym, Blaenau Ffestiniog. Habit coaching aligned with your training goals.
nutrition.intro: Training and nutrition go hand in hand. At Big Dragons Gym, we offer practical nutrition guidance — not medical advice, but real-world support to fuel your progress.
nutrition.approach: We focus on sustainable habits, not crash diets. Meal planning support, portion guidance, and alignment with your training goals — whether you're building muscle, losing fat, or simply eating better.

includes.support: Ongoing support alongside your gym programme

nutrition.disclaimer: Our nutrition guidance is for general fitness purposes only and is not a substitute for medical or dietary professional advice.
nutrition.linkPT: Nutrition coaching works best alongside personal training. Ask us about combined packages.

membership.metaTitle: 24 Hour Gym Blaenau Ffestiniog | Big Dragons Gym
membership.metaDescription: Join Big Dragons Gym for round-the-clock access in Blaenau Ffestiniog. Train whenever suits you — early mornings, late nights, any day.
membership.intro: Most gyms close early. Big Dragons Gym doesn't. Train on your schedule — any time, day or night.
membership.usp: Shift workers, early risers, night owls — life doesn't fit a 9-to-5 gym schedule. At Big Dragons Gym, the doors are always open.

includes.access: Gym access any time, day or night
includes.equipment: Premium free weights and training equipment

membership.howToJoin: Contact us to discuss membership options and get set up. We'll walk you through access instructions and answer any questions.
membership.safety: Members receive clear access instructions upon joining. The facility is monitored and maintained to a high standard for safe training at any hour.
membership.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch to discuss membership options and get set up with access.

location.metaTitle: Find Us | Gym Blaenau Ffestiniog LL41 3AL
location.metaDescription: Big Dragons Gym at Jerusalem Chapel, 32 High Street, Blaenau Ffestiniog LL41 3AL. Directions, parking, and map — your local 24/7 gym in North Wales.
location.intro: We're on High Street in the centre of Blaenau Ffestiniog — easy to reach from the A470, local villages, and the Conwy Valley corridor.
location.buildingNote: Big Dragons Gym is inside Jerusalem Chapel at 32 High Street. This is a separate business from Little Dragons Softplay — look for the gym entrance.

a470.title: From the A470
a470.text: Take the A470 into Blaenau Ffestiniog town centre. Continue onto High Street — Jerusalem Chapel is on High Street at number 32. Look for the gym entrance at the chapel building.

station.title: From Blaenau Ffestiniog Station
station.text: The train station is a short walk from High Street (approximately 5–10 minutes). Head towards the town centre and follow signs to High Street. Jerusalem Chapel is centrally located.

betws.title: From Betws-y-Coed / Conwy Valley
betws.text: Follow the A470 north towards Blaenau Ffestiniog. The journey takes approximately 20–30 minutes depending on traffic. High Street is in the town centre.

dolwyddelan.title: From Dolwyddelan / Penmachno
dolwyddelan.text: Take local roads to the A470, then follow signs to Blaenau Ffestiniog town centre. We're on High Street — the main street through town.

location.parking: Street parking is available on and around High Street. Additional parking can be found in the town centre. Please observe local parking restrictions and be considerate of residents.
location.areas: Big Dragons Gym welcomes members from Blaenau Ffestiniog, Ffestiniog, Dolwyddelan, Penrhyndeudraeth, Betws-y-Coed, and the wider Snowdonia and Gwynedd area.

contact.metaTitle: Contact Big Dragons Gym | Blaenau Ffestiniog
contact.metaDescription: Contact us at Big Dragons Gym. Call, WhatsApp, or send an enquiry about personal training, nutrition, or 24/7 membership.
contact.intro: Have a question about personal training, nutrition, or membership? We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

form.name: Full Name
form.gdpr: I agree to Big Dragons Gym storing my details to respond to this enquiry.
form.success: Thank you — your enquiry has been sent. We'll be in touch soon. You can also call directly on +44 7940 125381.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.

contact.directSubtitle: Call or message us directly — we're here to help.

faq.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about Big Dragons Gym — 24/7 access, personal training, membership, and location in Blaenau Ffestiniog.
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about training at Big Dragons Gym.

items.a1: Yes. Big Dragons Gym is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for members.
items.q2: Is this the same as Little Dragons Softplay?
items.a2: No. Big Dragons Gym and Little Dragons Softplay share the Jerusalem Chapel building at 32 High Street, but they are completely separate businesses with different entrances.
items.a3: Yes. We offer one-to-one personal training for all levels. Contact us to discuss your goals.
items.a4: Contact us by phone, WhatsApp, or the enquiry form on our website. We'll discuss membership options and get you set up.
items.a5: Jerusalem Chapel, 32 High Street, Blaenau Ffestiniog, LL41 3AL — in the town centre on High Street.
items.a6: Yes. We offer practical nutrition guidance and habit coaching to support your training goals. This is general fitness advice, not medical nutrition therapy.

privacy.content: Big Dragons Gym respects your privacy. We collect only the information you provide through our contact form (name, phone, email, and message) to respond to your enquiry. We do not sell or share your data with third parties. Data is stored securely and retained only as long as necessary to fulfil your enquiry. For questions, contact us at +44 7940 125381.

cookies.content: This website uses essential cookies for language preference and basic functionality. We may use analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to understand how visitors use our site. You can control cookies through your browser settings. By continuing to use this site, you consent to our use of cookies as described here.
